transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Spicy Boneless Chicken Feet]
[Spicy Chicken Feet]
[Spicy Tulip Chicken Feet]
[Hanshin Pocha]
[All of their popular dishes]
[Waited for almost 20 years]
[Well...?]
[Crazy]
[Warning: Spicy!]
[There's no escape]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat chicken feet
I really love eating Hanshin Pocha's chicken feet
But they have bones
So I've been wanting them to come up with boneless ones

And they finally did it!
Let's go eat some chicken feet
[Hanshin Pocha located near Seohyeon Station]
It's been so long since I've been to Hanshin Pocha
Boneless chicken feet... Amazing
I'll take all 3 kinds of chicken feet,
Add the glass noodles on the regular one,
Fried chicken, stir-fried seafood plate,
Beef pancake,
Cheese Egg Roll,
[Even making sure that her order is correct takes a long time]
[And she nailed it!]
[Rice balls come with an order of regular Hanshin chicken feet]
[Stir-fried seafood plate]
[Hanshin Fried Chicken]
[Beef pancakes]

[Cheese-filled Korean-style egg rolls]
[And today's highlight: Hanshin Chicken Feet]
[With glass noodles]
[Hanshin Spicy Chicken Feet]
[Tulip Chicken Feet]
[That's a lot of food...]
Everything is here!
I've never ordered this much at Hanshin Pocha before
3 different kinds of chicken feet orders
This is their new item: boneless chicken feet
Also added glass noodles to it
This is the Tulip one
And the regular one here
Fried chicken, beef pancake, stir-fried seafood plate,
And also the cheese egg roll
Looks scrumptious

I wonder what the boneless is like
This took almost 20 years to come out
Bon appetit
Amazing!
That's crazy
It's really chewy
Do you know how the texture is different from tradition and boneless?
The regular one tends to always taste better
But not this case
That's good
Amazing~!
This feels like I'm getting more collagen
It spreads out!
Thank you (for coming out with boneless)
Thank you Mr. Baek
Tulip one!

There's a problem with this It looks like it's flicking you off
Not pleasant
This is half-boneless
The big bone is there, but not the small ones
Cheers
This is really convenient to eat
They taste the same
Amazing
Some beef pancakes when it gets spicy
With scallions
Look at the thickness of the meat
Really thick, right?
This combination is insane
The thing about Hanshin chicken feet soup:
It has that thick, collagen-like soup
I love it Delicious

This calls for some rice balls
Mix it up
The rice ball...s
[Was a rice ball]
[Get some soup on it]
So good
The egg roll is really big
This still wouldn't fill me up
Some kind of a tomato sauce instead of ketchup
I dig it
It goes really well together
Seafood plate
They cook the noodles later for you You can eat it like this too
Just like chips
It has meat
Shrimp

And assorted seafood
I'll cut up the chicken for you
[They usually come served in pieces]
Thank you Can I have some mayo, please?
Amazing
That looks so juicy
Glossy
Bon appetit
Excuse me
Here's the mayo
[Can't forget about the alcohol]
I'm so happy right now Everything tastes so good
With happiness comes alcohol
Cheers
You can taste the alcohol, but it's very clean!
It's kinda sweet

Glass noodles
Get it together
This should be really good with mayo
Get a lot on it
Oh no, it's drying out
When it's like this,
There's a way
Pour in the bean sprout soup and boil
You can do this about 3 times total
This is it
Take the mussel
And stir-fry it
[Getting the mussel out of the shell]
[See you soon]
[Back to life]
Thank you

Stir-fried noodles
The same noodles
How do I explain this taste?
Stir-fried udon? no no
Pasta? no...
It's just tasty
Thank you
Which do I kill first?
You!
Final Verdict: It's a stir-fried seafood noodle with oyster sauce
I need to do better with these
Not that it's finished,
It's you next
It's spicy, but good
It's the spiciness that makes it good
I'm just bad at eating spicy foods

I used to be good at it
[Used to be...]
[Forget the past]
Now that it's too spicy,
Let's eat some chicken
Wake up!
Why's the chicken sweet?
Is it because I just had something spicy?
Hanshin's fried chicken is unique
The thin layer of batter is just like tangsuyuk (fried pork)
This is the good part
So juicy, really juicy Really
I feel like I can kill this in 20 seconds
I need to stop using that term
The pancakes are tasty!
Let's clean up a little over here

It's a mess
That's more like it
It's still spicy
Half-boneless
This one is spicy
Because...
It doesn't have soup
But it's so good
Hanshin Pocha!
I love you
[This is an obsession...]
I haven't been eating it with mayo, that's why it's so spicy
I can do it with mayo
Thank you
I can do it now
This is cheating

Everyone can do it
[Yeah with that much mayo]
So yummy
This looks like it's from hell
I just don't like food with bones in general
Because I eat a lot and it can get tedious
But I've always enjoyed Hanshin Pocha's chicken feet even with all the work
Our Hanshin chicken feet
1 last bite of it
This was so good
I'm going to eat this again here
[Warning: you can look ugly when eating chicken feet]
[Not suitable for your first date]
Hello
This is Mr. Baek's favorite drink
[Citrus soju]

[The owner's recommendation]
[Trust me on this]
[1 soju]
[1 water]
[Garnish]
Let's try it by itself
It's spirit with squeezed citrus
It has a clean finish
This tastes really good
[Perfect with chicken feet]
This drink is actually made with Jeju island citrus
They were wondering how they can use the ugly-looking ones that were not being sold
The farms asked Mr. Baek for a solution
He insisted they should do this with them
This drink really complements the spicy chicken feet Its got a clean taste and it's delicious
I feel like this drink will help the farms a lot

I got to try their new boneless chicken feet and other various dishes here at Hanshin Pocha
It was great because I enjoy eating them on my days off
Thanks everyone!
Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Han-gil Regional Children's Welfare Center' [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
